text.title: LLM Cost Optimization Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure from a raw spend dashboard to a committed cost-plan artefact.

step.name: instrument-attribution
step.input: API gateway / SDK middleware; observability stack URL.
step.action: Tag every request with pipeline_stage, model, user_id, tokens (input/output/cache_read/cache_creation/thinking). Persist for ≥14 days. Build a per-stage cost-share view.
step.output: Dashboard with cost_share, output_token_share, and request_rate per stage.
step.decision-gate: If <7 days of data, STOP — measure-before-optimize rule blocks all downstream steps.

step.name: classify-stages
step.action: Rank stages by cost_share. For top stages flag: (a) is request offline-tolerant (≥1h)? (b) is prefix ≥1024/2048 tokens and stable? (c) is output_token_share >60%? (d) does the current model exceed task complexity? Capture as per-stage classification rows.
step.output: Stage classification table with offline-OK, prefix-stable, output-heavy, model-overshoot flags.

step.name: route-by-complexity
step.action: Install a Haiku-grade classifier that emits {simple, medium, complex}. Configure router map: simple→Haiku, medium→Sonnet, complex→Opus. Validate on the golden eval set BEFORE rollout.
step.output: Router config; eval delta per stage (must be ≥SLO).

step.name: cache-stable-prefixes
step.action: Reorder content array: static prefix first (system + tool schemas + corpus), cache_control on its tail, dynamic content last. Choose TTL=300 (default) or 3600 (gap >5min, burst justifies 2× write surcharge).
step.output: Updated request layout; expected hit rate target ≥50%.

step.name: batch-the-offline
step.action: Move stage workload to client.beta.messages.batches.create (Claude) or batches.create (OpenAI). Add polling worker that retrieves batch_id and parses results. Hard-isolate from interactive endpoints.
step.output: Batch worker; 50% discount applied; per-stage SLA documented at 24h.

step.name: install-budget-guard
step.action: Wire a middleware budget guard at the API gateway: record cost per call, alert at alert_at_pct of daily_soft, refuse requests at daily_hard. Emit cost-plan artefact per content/02-output-contract.xml and run scripts/validate-cost-optimization.py.
step.output: Validated cop-* artefact; live budget guard; pre/post savings recorded after 7 days.
